slots.label: Foundation sponsor
slots.name: Available
slots.copy: Premium mission-aligned placement for a major partner that supports inclusive community sport.
slots.policy: Recommended: sporting goods, community health, accessibility, travel, education or local business.

slots.label: Community sponsor
slots.name: Available
slots.copy: Lower-cost placement for clubs, small businesses and community groups.
slots.policy: No gambling, exploitative products, or misleading health/performance claims.

slots.label: Affiliate / referral
slots.name: Future option
slots.copy: Optional future referral links for equipment, events or ticket partners after policy review.
